summary: The entire repo IS documentation — a curated list of 363 tutorial links across 35 technology categories. Well-organized with table of contents, consistent formatting, and multi-language coverage. Missing: LICENSE, CONTRIBUTING.md, link health checking. No dead link detection automation.

findings.detail: 504-line README.md. 35 technology categories with TOC. Consistent format: language bold, title italic, link. Easy to scan.
363 tutorial links covering 3D renderers to web servers. Multi-language: C, C++, Python, JavaScript, Rust, Go, Java, Ruby, and more. Good breadth.
Links to a mix of blog posts, GitHub repos, and courses. Quality varies — no rating system, no difficulty markers, no freshness indicators. Some links likely dead after 8 years.
No LICENSE, no CONTRIBUTING.md, no link health automation, no difficulty/quality ratings.
codecrafters.io banner at top and 'Build your own' links to their paid platform interspersed. Marketing integration is visible but not overwhelming.
